auth.title: Crumi
auth.subtitle: Your Sales Buddy
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

auth.metaDescription: Login to Crumi to start managing your customers.

landing.heroDescription: Never forget your customers. Crumi remembers all your sales activities and nudges you at the right time.

customerManagement.title: Isolated Customer Management
customerManagement.description: Securely protect customer data with complete workspace-level data isolation.

smartNudge.title: Smart Nudge System
smartNudge.description: Intelligent reminders that suggest activities when the configured cooltime period expires.

visualPipeline.title: Visual Pipeline
visualPipeline.description: Easily manage sales stages and track deal probabilities with drag-and-drop.

noWorkspaces.description: Start by creating your first workspace below.

settings.title: Workspace Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage global settings and team resources for your workspace.

members.title: Team Member Management
members.footnote1: * Removing a member from the workspace will revoke their access to all related data.
members.footnote2: * The Owner role is retained until it is transferred to another member.

removeMember.confirmMessage:
Are you sure you want to remove "{memberName}" from this workspace?
Removed members will no longer have access to workspace data.

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.subtitle: Upgrade your plan to experience all of Crumi's powerful features.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Free forever plan for individuals and small teams

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: All features for growing sales teams

enterprise.name: Business
enterprise.description: Dedicated management tools for larger organizations

billing.annualDiscount: Get up to 20% off with annual billing.

cooltime.title: Nudge System Settings
cooltime.subtitle: Set the cooltime period (in days) that triggers nudge reminders when there's been no activity with customers or projects.
cooltime.nudgeAfter: A nudge will be sent {days} days after the last activity.
cooltime.infoDescription: Crumi helps sales reps never forget a customer. If no activity (calls, emails, meetings) is recorded within the set period, the dashboard will prioritize that customer for follow-up.

aiCoach.title: AI Sales Coach
aiCoach.subtitle: Analyzes your sales data in real-time and suggests the optimal path.
aiCoach.greeting: Hello! We've detected {dealCount} deals and {customerCount} valuable relationships.
aiCoach.hasInsights: Our analysis found an important discovery related to {firstInsight}. Shall we take a look?
aiCoach.needMoreData: We need a bit more data to analyze. Try adding more customers or activity records!
aiCoach.askPlaceholder: Ask your coach about a specific deal or strategy...
aiCoach.healthComment: Based on current metrics, your team's sales activity is stable. Notably, {count} near-close deals suggest a healthy cash flow.
